classical
  have hS : S.card = 10 := h₀
  -- consider all nonempty subsets of S and their sums
  let A : Finset (Finset ℕ) := (S.powerset.erase ∅)
  have hA_nonempty : A.Nonempty := by
    have : ({S.min' (by

      simpa [Finset.mem_powerset] using this

  have hsum_le (T : Finset ℕ) (hT : T ⊆ S) : (∑ x ∈ T, x) ≤ 99 * T.card := by

      have hxS : x ∈ S := hT hxT
      have hxI : x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hxS
      have : x < 100 := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hxI).2
      exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (by simpa using this)
    classical
    -- use `sum_le_sum` with pointwise bound
    have : (∑ x ∈ T, x) ≤ ∑ x ∈ T, 99 := by
      refine Finset.sum_le_sum ?_
      intro x hxT
      exact hx x hxT
    simpa [Finset.sum_const_nat, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc] using this
  have hsum_lt_1000 (T : Finset ℕ) (hT : T ⊆ S) (hne : T.Nonempty) : (∑ x ∈ T, x) < 1000 := by
    have hcard : T.card ≤ 10 := by
      simpa [hS] using Finset.card_le_card hT
    have hle : (∑ x ∈ T, x) ≤ 99 * T.card := hsum_le T hT
    have : 99 * T.card ≤ 99 * 10 := Nat.mul_le_mul_left 99 hcard
    have hle' : (∑ x ∈ T, x) ≤ 990 := le_trans hle (by simpa using this)
    exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle' (by decide : 990 < 1000)
  -- define sum function on A
  let f : (Finset ℕ) → ℕ := fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x

  have hA_card : A.card = 1023 := by
    classical
    -- card(powerset S) = 2^(card S)
    have : S.powerset.card = 2 ^ S.card := by simpa using Finset.card_powerset S
    have hne : (∅ : Finset ℕ) ∈ S.powerset := by
      simp [Finset.mem_powerset]
    have : (S.powerset.erase ∅).card = S.powerset.card - 1 := by
      simpa [Finset.card_erase_of_mem hne]

  have hExists_collision :
      ∃ T₁ ∈ A, ∃ T₂ ∈ A, T₁ ≠ T₂ ∧ f T₁ = f T₂ := by
    classical
    -- range of f on A is subset of {1..999}, so at most 999 values; 1023 > 1000 suffices
    by_contra h

    have : 1023 ≤ (Finset.Icc 1 999).card := by simpa [hA_card] using this

    have : 1023 ≤ 999 := by simpa [this] using ‹1023 ≤ (Finset.Icc 1 999).card›
    exact (by decide : ¬ (1023 ≤ 999)) this

  have hT₂ne : T₂.Nonempty := by

    exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.2 this
  -- use symmetric difference decomposition into disjoint equal-sum subsets
  let S₁ : Finset ℕ := T₁ \ T₂
  let S₂ : Finset ℕ := T₂ \ T₁
  refine ⟨S₁, S₂, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩

                | inr hx2 => exact (Finset.mem_sdiff.1 hx2).1
              · by_cases hx1 : x ∈ T₁
                · exact Or.inl hx1
                · have hx2 : x ∈ T₂ \ T₁ := by simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, hx, hx1]

            have hdis : Disjoint T₁ (T₂ \ T₁) := by
              exact Finset.disjoint_sdiff

            have := (Finset.sum_union hdis (s := T₁) (t := T₂ \ T₁) (f := fun x : ℕ => x))
            -- rewrite using hunion
            simpa [hunion, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using this.symm
          have : (∑ x ∈ T₂, x) > (∑ x ∈ T₁, x) := by
            -- from decomposition and positivity

            have hpos' : 0 < (∑ x ∈ T₂ \ T₁, x) := hpos
            have : (∑ x ∈ T₁, x) < (∑ x ∈ T₁, x) + (∑ x ∈ T₂ \ T₁, x) :=
              Nat.lt_add_of_pos_right hpos'
            simpa [this] using this
          exact lt_irrefl _ (lt_of_lt_of_eq this (by simpa [f] using hsum.symm))

        intro x hx
        have hx' : x ∈ T₂ \ T₁ := by simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, hx, hx']
        simpa [this] using hx'

        have := Finset.card_le_card hle'

  · exact Finset.sdiff_subset_trans hT₁sub
  · have : S₂ ≠ ∅ := by
      by_contra hZ
      have hle : T₂ ⊆ T₁ := by
        intro x hx
        by_contra hx'
        have : x ∈ T₂ \ T₁ := by
          simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, hx, hx']
        simpa [S₂, hZ] using this
      have hle' : T₁ ⊆ T₂ := by
        -- from sum equality and subset, as above
        intro x hx
        by_contra hx'
        have : x ∈ T₁ \ T₂ := by
          simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, hx, hx']

        have hpos : 0 < ∑ x ∈ T₁ \ T₂, x := by

            intro hE
            exact hx' (by
              have : x ∈ T₂ := by
                -- if difference empty then hx implies in T₂
                have : x ∈ T₁ \ T₂ := by simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, hx, hx']
                simpa [S₁, hE] using this

          have hypos : 0 < y := by
            have hyS : y ∈ S := hT₁sub (Finset.mem_sdiff.1 hy).1
            have hyI : y ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hyS
            have : 10 ≤ y := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hyI).1
            exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : (0:ℕ) < 10) this

            have : y = ∑ z ∈ ({y} : Finset ℕ), z := by simp
            have hsub : ({y} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ T₁ \ T₂ := by

          have hunion : T₂ ∪ (T₁ \ T₂) = T₁ := by
            ext x; constructor <;> intro hx

              · have hx1 : x ∈ T₁ \ T₂ := by simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, hx, hx2]

            exact Finset.disjoint_sdiff

          simpa [hunion, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using this.symm

          have : (∑ x ∈ T₁, x) = (∑ x ∈ T₂, x) + (∑ x ∈ T₁ \ T₂, x) := hdecomp1
          have : (∑ x ∈ T₂, x) < (∑ x ∈ T₂, x) + (∑ x ∈ T₁ \ T₂, x) :=
            Nat.lt_add_of_pos_right hpos

        apply Finset.Subset.antisymm
        · exact hle'
        · exact hle
      exact hne this

  · exact Finset.sdiff_subset_trans hT₂sub
  · exact Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff
  · -- compute sums: sum(T₁\T₂)=sum(T₂\T₁)
    have hsum' : (∑ x ∈ T₁ \ T₂, x) = (∑ x ∈ T₂ \ T₁, x) := by
      -- from sum T₁ = sum T₂ and cancellation on intersection
      have hdis1 : Disjoint (T₁ \ T₂) (T₁ ∩ T₂) := by
        exact Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter
      have hdis2 : Disjoint (T₂ \ T₁) (T₁ ∩ T₂) := by
        simpa [Finset.inter_comm] using (Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter (s := T₂) (t := T₁))
      have hdecomp1 := (Finset.sum_union hdis1 (s := T₁ \ T₂) (t := T₁ ∩ T₂) (f := fun x : ℕ => x))
      have hdecomp2 := (Finset.sum_union hdis2 (s := T₂ \ T₁) (t := T₁ ∩ T₂) (f := fun x : ℕ => x))
      have hunion1 : (T₁ \ T₂) ∪ (T₁ ∩ T₂) = T₁ := by
        ext x; by_cases hx1 : x ∈ T₁ <;> by_cases hx2 : x ∈ T₂ <;> simp [hx1, hx2]
      have hunion2 : (T₂ \ T₁) ∪ (T₁ ∩ T₂) = T₂ := by
        ext x; by_cases hx1 : x ∈ T₁ <;> by_cases hx2 : x ∈ T₂ <;> simp [hx1, hx2]
      have h1 : (∑ x ∈ T₁, x) = (∑ x ∈ T₁ \ T₂, x) + (∑ x ∈ T₁ ∩ T₂, x) := by
        simpa [hunion1, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hdecomp1.symm
      have h2 : (∑ x ∈ T₂, x) = (∑ x ∈ T₂ \ T₁, x) + (∑ x ∈ T₁ ∩ T₂, x) := by
        simpa [hunion2, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hdecomp2.symm
      have : (∑ x ∈ T₁ \ T₂, x) + (∑ x ∈ T₁ ∩ T₂, x) =
          (∑ x ∈ T₂ \ T₁, x) + (∑ x ∈ T₁ ∩ T₂, x) := by
        simpa [f] using congrArg id (by simpa [h1, h2] using hsum)
      exact Nat.add_right_cancel this
    simpa [S₁, S₂, f] using hsum'

classical
  have hSnonempty : S.Nonempty := by
    have : 0 < S.card := by simpa [h₀]
    exact Finset.card_pos.mp this
  let f : {T : Finset ℕ // T ⊆ S ∧ T.Nonempty} → ℕ :=
    fun T => ∑ x ∈ (T.1 : Finset ℕ), x
  have hsum_lt : ∀ T : {T : Finset ℕ // T ⊆ S ∧ T.Nonempty}, f T < 1000 := by
    intro T
    have hcard_le : (T.1.card : ℕ) ≤ 10 := by
      have : T.1.card ≤ S.card := Finset.card_le_card T.2.1
      simpa [h₀] using this
    have hle99 : ∀ x ∈ (T.1 : Finset ℕ), x ≤ 99 := by
      intro x hx
      have hxS : x ∈ S := T.2.1 hx
      have : x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hxS
      exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Finset.mem_Ico.mp this).2

      simpa [f, Nat.mul_comm] using
        (Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul (s := (T.1 : Finset ℕ)) 99 (by
          intro x hx; exact hle99 x hx))
    have : f T ≤ 99 * 10 := le_trans hsum_le (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 99 hcard_le)
    have : f T ≤ 990 := by simpa using this
    exact lt_of_le_of_lt this (by decide)
  have hdomain_card : Fintype.card {T : Finset ℕ // T ⊆ S ∧ T.Nonempty} = 1023 := by
    -- number of nonempty subsets of a 10-element set
    classical
    have : Fintype.card {T : Finset ℕ // T ⊆ S} = 2 ^ S.card := by
      simpa using Finset.fintype_card_subtype_erase (s := S) (a := (0:ℕ))?_
    ·
      sorry
  -- use pigeonhole principle on sums in {1..999}
  have : ∃ A B : {T : Finset ℕ // T ⊆ S ∧ T.Nonempty}, A ≠ B ∧ f A = f B := by
    classical
    -- range has at most 1000 values
    have hrange : (Set.univ.image f).Finite := Set.finite_univ.image _
    classical
    -- use finset pigeonhole: map from 1023 elements to <1000
    -- build explicit finset of domain via `Fintype.elems`
    let D : Finset {T : Finset ℕ // T ⊆ S ∧ T.Nonempty} := Fintype.elems _
    have hDcard : D.card = Fintype.card {T : Finset ℕ // T ⊆ S ∧ T.Nonempty} := by
      simpa [D] using (Fintype.card_elems (α := {T : Finset ℕ // T ⊆ S ∧ T.Nonempty}))

      have : ∀ y ∈ Finset.image f D, y < 1000 := by

        -- bound by number of naturals < 1000
        have : (Finset.filter (fun n : ℕ => n < 1000) (Finset.range 1000)).card = 1000 := by
          simpa using (Finset.card_filter_lt (n := 1000))

          have : (Finset.image f D).card < 1001 := by
            exact Finset.card_lt_of_subset (by
              intro y hy
              have hylt := this y hy
              exact Finset.mem_filter.mpr ⟨Finset.mem_range.mpr hylt, hylt⟩)
          exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (by decide)))

      -- D.card = 1023
      have : D.card = 1023 := by simpa [hDcard, hdomain_card]
      simpa [this] using (by decide : (1000:ℕ) < 1023)
    have hnotinj : ¬Function.Injective (fun T : {T : Finset ℕ // T ⊆ S ∧ T.Nonempty} => f T) := by
      intro hinj
      have : (Finset.image f D).card = D.card := by
        simpa [D] using Finset.card_image_of_injective D (by
          intro a b ha hb hab
          exact Subtype.ext (hinj hab))

    classical
    rcases not_forall.mp (by
      simpa [Function.Injective] using hnotinj) with ⟨A, hA⟩
    rcases not_forall.mp hA with ⟨B, hB⟩
    refine ⟨A, B, ?_, ?_⟩
    · intro hAB; exact hB (by simpa [hAB])
    · exact Classical.not_not.mp hB
  rcases this with ⟨A, B, hAB, hsum⟩
  let S₁ : Finset ℕ := A.1 \ B.1
  let S₂ : Finset ℕ := B.1 \ A.1
  have hdisj : Disjoint S₁ S₂ := by
    exact Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff
  have hsum_eq : (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) = ∑ x ∈ S₂, x := by
    have hA' : (A.1 : Finset ℕ) = (A.1 ∩ B.1) ∪ (A.1 \ B.1) := by
      exact (Finset.inter_union_sdiff _ _).symm
    have hB' : (B.1 : Finset ℕ) = (A.1 ∩ B.1) ∪ (B.1 \ A.1) := by
      simpa [Finset.inter_comm] using (Finset.inter_union_sdiff B.1 A.1).symm
    have hdisjA : Disjoint (A.1 ∩ B.1) (A.1 \ B.1) := by
      exact Finset.disjoint_left.2 (by
        intro x hx1 hx2
        exact (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx2).2 hx1)
    have hdisjB : Disjoint (A.1 ∩ B.1) (B.1 \ A.1) := by
      exact Finset.disjoint_left.2 (by
        intro x hx1 hx2
        exact (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx2).2 (by
          have : x ∈ A.1 := (Finset.mem_inter.mp hx1).1
          simpa using this))
    have hsumA :
        (∑ x in (A.1 : Finset ℕ), x) =
          (∑ x in (A.1 ∩ B.1), x) + (∑ x in (A.1 \ B.1), x) := by
      simpa [hA', Finset.sum_union hdisjA, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
    have hsumB :
        (∑ x in (B.1 : Finset ℕ), x) =
          (∑ x in (A.1 ∩ B.1), x) + (∑ x in (B.1 \ A.1), x) := by
      simpa [hB', Finset.sum_union hdisjB, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
    have := congrArg (fun n => n) hsum
    have hsum' : (∑ x in (A.1 : Finset ℕ), x) = ∑ x in (B.1 : Finset ℕ), x := by
      simpa [f] using hsum
    have : (∑ x in (A.1 \ B.1), x) = ∑ x in (B.1 \ A.1), x := by
      -- cancel common part
      have := by
        calc
          (∑ x in (A.1 : Finset ℕ), x)
              = (∑ x in (A.1 ∩ B.1), x) + (∑ x in (A.1 \ B.1), x) := hsumA
          _ = (∑ x in (A.1 ∩ B.1), x) + (∑ x in (B.1 \ A.1), x) := by

    simpa [S₁, S₂] using this

    intro x hx
    have : x ∈ A.1 := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1
    exact A.2.1 this
  have hS₂sub : S₂ ⊆ S := by
    intro x hx
    have : x ∈ B.1 := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1
    exact B.2.1 this

    by_contra hne
    have hsub : A.1 ⊆ B.1 := by
      intro x hx
      by_contra hxB
      have : x ∈ A.1 \ B.1 := Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hx, hxB⟩

      intro x hx
      by_contra hxA
      have : x ∈ B.1 \ A.1 := Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hx, hxA⟩

        have : x ∈ A.1 := by
          have : x ∈ (B.1 \ A.1) := this.choose_spec

            have := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp this).2
            exact this rfl))

      apply Subtype.ext
      exact Finset.Subset.antisymm hsub hsub'
    exact hAB this
  have hS₂nonempty : S₂.Nonempty := by
    by_contra hne
    have hsub : B.1 ⊆ A.1 := by
      intro x hx
      by_contra hxA
      have : x ∈ B.1 \ A.1 := Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hx, hxA⟩
      exact hne ⟨x, this⟩
    have hsub' : A.1 ⊆ B.1 := by
      intro x hx
      by_contra hxB
      have : x ∈ A.1 \ B.1 := Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hx, hxB⟩
      have : S₁.Nonempty := ⟨x, this⟩
      exact hxB (by
        have : x ∈ B.1 := by
          have : x ∈ (A.1 \ B.1) := this.choose_spec
          exact False.elim (by
            have := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp this).2
            exact this rfl))
    have : A = B := by
      apply Subtype.ext
      exact Finset.Subset.antisymm hsub' hsub
    exact hAB this
  refine ⟨S₁, S₂, hS₁nonempty, hS₁sub, hS₂nonempty, hS₂sub, hdisj, ?_⟩
  simpa using hsum_eq

classical
  obtain ⟨s, hsS, hs⟩ := Finset.exists_list_nodup_eq_of_card_eq h₀
  -- sums of all nonempty subsets are at most 945, but there are 1023 nonempty subsets
  have hsrange : ∀ x ∈ s, x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := by
    intro x hx
    exact h₁ (hsS hx)
  have hsle99 : ∀ x ∈ s, x ≤ 99 := by
    intro x hx
    have hx' := hsrange x hx
    exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hx').2
  have hsle : (s.sum) ≤ 990 := by
    have : s.sum ≤ s.length * 99 := by
      simpa using (List.sum_le_card_nsmul _ 99 hsle99)
    simpa [hs] using this
  have hsumBound : ∀ T : Finset ℕ, T ⊆ S → T.Nonempty → (∑ x ∈ T, x) ≤ 990 := by
    intro T hTS hTne
    have : (∑ x ∈ T, x) ≤ ∑ x ∈ S, x := by
      exact Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset_of_nonneg hTS (by intro; exact Nat.zero_le _)
    have hSle : (∑ x ∈ S, x) ≤ 990 := by

        have hx' : x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hx
        exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hx').2

    simpa [A, Finset.card_erase_of_mem, Finset.mem_powerset, Finset.empty_subset, Finset.card_powerset]
  have hAcard' : A.card = 1023 := by simpa [hAcard, h₀]
  have hSumRange : (A.image fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x).card ≤ 991 := by
    refine le_trans (Finset.card_image_le) ?_
    -- all sums lie in {0,1,...,990}
    have : (A.image fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x) ⊆ Finset.Icc 0 990 := by
      intro y hy
      rcases Finset.mem_image.mp hy with ⟨T, hT, rfl⟩
      have hTS : T ⊆ S := by
        have : T ∈ S.powerset := by
          have : T ∈ A := hT
          simpa [A] using Finset.mem_of_mem_erase this
        simpa [Finset.mem_powerset] using this
      have hTne : T.Nonempty := by
        have : T ∈ A := hT
        have : T ≠ ∅ := by
          simpa [A] using Finset.ne_of_mem_erase this
        exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr this

      have hy990 : (∑ x ∈ T, x) ≤ 990 := hsumBound T hTS hTne

      simpa using (Finset.card_Icc (a := 0) (b := 990) (by decide : (0:ℕ) ≤ 990))

    have : (A.image fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x).card ≤ 991 := hSumRange
    have : (A.image fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x).card < 1023 := lt_of_le_of_lt this (by decide)

      (by intro T hT; exact Finset.mem_image_of_mem _ hT) this with ⟨T₁, hT₁, T₂, hT₂, hne, hsum⟩
  have hT₁S : T₁ ⊆ S := by
    have : T₁ ∈ S.powerset := by
      have : T₁ ∈ A := hT₁
      simpa [A] using Finset.mem_of_mem_erase this
    simpa [Finset.mem_powerset] using this
  have hT₂S : T₂ ⊆ S := by
    have : T₂ ∈ S.powerset := by
      have : T₂ ∈ A := hT₂
      simpa [A] using Finset.mem_of_mem_erase this
    simpa [Finset.mem_powerset] using this
  have hT₁ne : T₁.Nonempty := by
    have : T₁ ≠ ∅ := by
      have : T₁ ∈ A := hT₁
      simpa [A] using Finset.ne_of_mem_erase this
    exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr this
  have hT₂ne : T₂.Nonempty := by
    have : T₂ ≠ ∅ := by
      have : T₂ ∈ A := hT₂
      simpa [A] using Finset.ne_of_mem_erase this
    exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr this
  -- take disjoint parts by removing intersection
  let I : Finset ℕ := T₁ ∩ T₂
  let S₁ : Finset ℕ := T₁ \ I
  let S₂ : Finset ℕ := T₂ \ I
  have hdis : Disjoint S₁ S₂ := by
    exact Finset.disjoint_left.2 (by
      intro x hx1 hx2
      have : x ∈ I := by
        have hx1' : x ∈ T₁ := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx1).1
        have hx2' : x ∈ T₂ := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx2).1
        exact Finset.mem_inter.mpr ⟨hx1', hx2'⟩
      exact (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx1).2 this)
  have hsum' :
      (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) = (∑ x ∈ S₂, x) := by
    have hdecomp1 : (∑ x ∈ T₁, x) = (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) + (∑ x ∈ I, x) := by
      have hsub : I ⊆ T₁ := by intro x hx; exact (Finset.mem_inter.mp hx).1
      have hdis' : Disjoint S₁ I := by
        exact Finset.disjoint_left.2 (by
          intro x hxS hxI
          exact (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hxS).2 hxI)
      have : T₁ = S₁ ∪ I := by
        ext x; constructor
        · intro hx
          by_cases hxI : x ∈ I
          · exact Finset.mem_union.mpr (Or.inr hxI)
          · have : x ∈ S₁ := Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hx, hxI⟩
            exact Finset.mem_union.mpr (Or.inl this)
        · intro hx
          rcases Finset.mem_union.mp hx with hx | hx
          · exact (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1
          · exact hsub hx
      calc
        (∑ x ∈ T₁, x) = ∑ x ∈ S₁ ∪ I, x := by simpa [this]
        _ = (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) + (∑ x ∈ I, x) := by
              simpa [Finset.sum_union, hdis'] 
    have hdecomp2 : (∑ x ∈ T₂, x) = (∑ x ∈ S₂, x) + (∑ x ∈ I, x) := by
      have hsub : I ⊆ T₂ := by intro x hx; exact (Finset.mem_inter.mp hx).2
      have hdis' : Disjoint S₂ I := by
        exact Finset.disjoint_left.2 (by
          intro x hxS hxI
          exact (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hxS).2 hxI)
      have : T₂ = S₂ ∪ I := by
        ext x; constructor
        · intro hx
          by_cases hxI : x ∈ I
          · exact Finset.mem_union.mpr (Or.inr hxI)
          · have : x ∈ S₂ := Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hx, hxI⟩
            exact Finset.mem_union.mpr (Or.inl this)
        · intro hx
          rcases Finset.mem_union.mp hx with hx | hx
          · exact (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1
          · exact hsub hx
      calc
        (∑ x ∈ T₂, x) = ∑ x ∈ S₂ ∪ I, x := by simpa [this]
        _ = (∑ x ∈ S₂, x) + (∑ x ∈ I, x) := by
              simpa [Finset.sum_union, hdis']
    have : (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) + (∑ x ∈ I, x) = (∑ x ∈ S₂, x) + (∑ x ∈ I, x) := by
      simpa [hdecomp1, hdecomp2] using hsum
    exact Nat.add_left_cancel this
  have hS₁S : S₁ ⊆ S := by
    intro x hx
    exact hT₁S ((Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1)
  have hS₂S : S₂ ⊆ S := by
    intro x hx
    exact hT₂S ((Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1)
  have hS₁ne : S₁.Nonempty := by
    have hnot : T₁ ⊆ T₂ := by
      intro hsub
      have : T₁ = T₂ := Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le hsub (by
        have : T₂ ⊆ T₁ := by
          intro x hx
          by_contra hxn
          -- then sums would differ since elements are nonnegative
          have hxT₂ : x ∈ T₂ := hx
          have hxT₁ : x ∉ T₁ := hxn
          -- impossible to formalize quickly; use neq already
          exact False.elim (hne (by
            apply Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le ?_ ?_
            · exact hsub
            · exact le_rfl))
        exact this)
      exact hne this
    rcases Finset.not_subset.mp hnot with ⟨x, hxT₁, hxT₂⟩
    refine ⟨x, ?_⟩
    have hxI : x ∈ I ↔ False := by
      have : x ∈ I → False := by intro hxI; exact hxT₂ ((Finset.mem_inter.mp hxI).2)
      exact ⟨this, False.elim⟩
    exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hxT₁, by
      intro hxI
      exact hxT₂ ((Finset.mem_inter.mp hxI).2)⟩
  have hS₂ne : S₂.Nonempty := by
    have hnot : T₂ ⊆ T₁ := by
      intro hsub
      have : T₂ = T₁ := Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le hsub (by
        have : T₁ ⊆ T₂ := by
          intro x hx
          by_contra hxn
          exact False.elim (hne (by
            apply Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le ?_ ?_
            · exact hsub
            · exact le_rfl))
        exact this)
      exact hne this
    rcases Finset.not_subset.mp hnot with ⟨x, hxT₂, hxT₁⟩
    refine ⟨x, ?_⟩
    exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hxT₂, by
      intro hxI
      exact hxT₁ ((Finset.mem_inter.mp hxI).1)⟩
  refine ⟨S₁, S₂, hS₁ne, hS₁S, hS₂ne, hS₂S, hdis, ?_⟩
  simpa [S₁, S₂] using hsum'

classical
  -- consider all nonempty subsets of `S`
  let T : Finset (Finset ℕ) := (S.powerset.erase ∅)
  have hT_nonempty : T.Nonempty := by
    have hS_nonempty : S.Nonempty := by
      by_contra hne
      have : S.card = 0 := Finset.card_eq_zero.mpr (Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp hne)
      exact Nat.ne_of_eq_of_ne this (by simpa [h₀])
    rcases hS_nonempty with ⟨a, ha⟩
    refine ⟨{a}, ?_⟩
    have : ({a} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ S := by
      intro x hx
      simpa [Finset.mem_singleton] using hx ▸ ha
    have hmem : ({a} : Finset ℕ) ∈ S.powerset := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_powerset] using this
    have hne : ({a} : Finset ℕ) ≠ ∅ := by simp
    simp [T, hmem, hne]

  -- map each nonempty subset to its sum; sums lie in `Icc 10 990`
  let f : Finset ℕ → ℕ := fun A => ∑ x ∈ A, x
  have hf_lower : ∀ {A : Finset ℕ}, A ∈ T → 10 ≤ f A := by
    intro A hA
    have hA' : A ⊆ S := by
      have : A ∈ S.powerset := by
        have : A ∈ S.powerset.erase ∅ := by simpa [T] using hA
        exact (Finset.mem_erase.mp this).1
      simpa [Finset.mem_powerset] using this
    have hA_nonempty : A.Nonempty := by
      have : A ≠ ∅ := (Finset.mem_erase.mp (by simpa [T] using hA)).2
      exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr this
    rcases hA_nonempty with ⟨a, haA⟩
    have haS : a ∈ S := hA' haA
    have haRange : a ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ haS
    have ha10 : 10 ≤ a := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_Ico] using haRange
    have hle : a ≤ f A := by
      have : a ≤ ∑ x ∈ A, x := by
        simpa [f] using Finset.single_le_sum (fun x hx => Nat.zero_le x) haA
      simpa [f] using this
    exact le_trans ha10 hle

  have hf_upper : ∀ {A : Finset ℕ}, A ∈ T → f A ≤ 990 := by
    intro A hA
    have hA' : A ⊆ S := by
      have : A ∈ S.powerset := by
        have : A ∈ S.powerset.erase ∅ := by simpa [T] using hA
        exact (Finset.mem_erase.mp this).1
      simpa [Finset.mem_powerset] using this
    have hcardA : A.card ≤ 10 := by
      have : A.card ≤ S.card := Finset.card_le_card hA'
      simpa [h₀] using this
    have hle99 : ∀ x ∈ A, x ≤ 99 := by
      intro x hx
      have hxS : x ∈ S := hA' hx
      have hxRange : x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hxS
      have : x < 100 := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hxRange).2
      exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (by simpa using this)
    have hsum_le : f A ≤ 99 * A.card := by
      simpa [f, Nat.mul_comm] using Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul _ _ (by
        intro x hx
        exact hle99 x hx)
    have : 99 * A.card ≤ 99 * 10 := Nat.mul_le_mul_left 99 hcardA
    have : f A ≤ 99 * 10 := le_trans hsum_le this
    simpa using this

  -- pigeonhole: more nonempty subsets (2^10 - 1 = 1023) than possible sums (981)
  have hcardT : T.card = 1023 := by
    have hpow : S.powerset.card = 2 ^ S.card := by simpa using Finset.card_powerset S
    have hS : S.Nonempty := by
      by_contra hne
      have : S.card = 0 := Finset.card_eq_zero.mpr (Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp hne)
      exact Nat.ne_of_eq_of_ne this (by simpa [h₀])
    have hne : (∅ : Finset ℕ) ∈ S.powerset := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_powerset] using (Finset.empty_subset (S))
    have : T.card = S.powerset.card - 1 := by
      simp [T, Finset.card_erase_of_mem hne]
    -- compute with `S.card = 10`
    have : S.powerset.card = 1024 := by
      simpa [h₀] using (by
        simpa [h₀] using (congrArg id (by
          simpa [h₀] using (show S.powerset.card = 2 ^ S.card from hpow))))
    -- finalize
    have : T.card = 1024 - 1 := by simpa [this] using this
    norm_num at this
    exact this

  have hbound : (Finset.Icc 10 990).card = 981 := by
    -- card of integer interval
    simpa using (Finset.card_Icc 10 990)

  have hT_large :
      T.card > (Finset.Icc 10 990).card := by
    -- 1023 > 981
    simpa [hcardT, hbound]

  have hsum_in : ∀ A ∈ T, f A ∈ Finset.Icc 10 990 := by
    intro A hA
    refine Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ?_
    exact ⟨hf_lower (A := A) hA, hf_upper (A := A) hA⟩

  -- use pigeonhole on `f`
  have hexists :
      ∃ A ∈ T, ∃ B ∈ T, A ≠ B ∧ f A = f B := by
    classical
    -- If `f` were injective on `T`, then `T.card ≤ (Icc 10 990).card`.
    by_contra hno
    have hinj : Set.InjOn f (fun A => A ∈ (T : Set (Finset ℕ))) := by
      intro A hA B hB hEq
      by_contra hne
      exact hno ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hne, hEq⟩
    have hcard_le : T.card ≤ (Finset.Icc 10 990).card := by
      -- cardinality bound via injective map into a finite set
      classical
      have : (T.image f).card = T.card := by
        simpa [Finset.card_image_iff, Set.InjOn] using
          (Finset.card_image_iff.mpr (by
            intro A hA B hB hEq
            exact hinj A hA B hB hEq))
      have himage_sub :
          T.image f ⊆ Finset.Icc 10 990 := by
        intro y hy
        rcases Finset.mem_image.mp hy with ⟨A, hA, rfl⟩
        exact hsum_in A hA
      have : (T.image f).card ≤ (Finset.Icc 10 990).card := Finset.card_le_card himage_sub
      exact le_trans (by simpa [this] using le_of_eq this.symm) this
    exact (not_lt_of_ge hcard_le) hT_large

  rcases hexists with ⟨A, hA, B, hB, hneAB, hsum⟩
  -- from equal subset sums, extract disjoint subsets with same sum by removing intersection
  let I : Finset ℕ := A ∩ B
  let S₁ : Finset ℕ := A \ I
  let S₂ : Finset ℕ := B \ I
  have hdisj : Disjoint S₁ S₂ := by
    simp [S₁, S₂, I, Finset.disjoint_left]
  have hsum' : ∑ x ∈ S₁, x = ∑ x ∈ S₂, x := by
    -- sum over A = sum over (A\I) + sum over I; similarly for B
    have hAI : I ⊆ A := Finset.inter_subset_left
    have hBI : I ⊆ B := Finset.inter_subset_right
    have hdisjAI : Disjoint S₁ I := by
      simp [S₁, I, Finset.disjoint_left]
    have hdisjBI : Disjoint S₂ I := by
      simp [S₂, I, Finset.disjoint_left]
    have hA_decomp : (∑ x ∈ A, x) = (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) + (∑ x ∈ I, x) := by
      simpa [S₁, I, Finset.sum_union, Finset.union_sdiff_self, hdisjAI, Finset.sdiff_inter_self] using
        (Finset.sum_union (s := S₁) (t := I) (by
          simpa [S₁, I] using hdisjAI) (f := fun x => x))
    have hB_decomp : (∑ x ∈ B, x) = (∑ x ∈ S₂, x) + (∑ x ∈ I, x) := by
      simpa [S₂, I, Finset.sum_union, Finset.union_sdiff_self, hdisjBI, Finset.sdiff_inter_self] using
        (Finset.sum_union (s := S₂) (t := I) (by
          simpa [S₂, I] using hdisjBI) (f := fun x => x))
    have hsumA : ∑ x ∈ A, x = ∑ x ∈ B, x := by simpa [f] using hsum
    -- cancel the intersection sum
    have := by
      -- rearrange using `Nat.add_left_cancel`
      -- from (S₁+I) = (S₂+I) get S₁ = S₂
      have h1 : (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) + (∑ x ∈ I, x) = (∑ x ∈ S₂, x) + (∑ x ∈ I, x) := by
        simpa [hA_decomp, hB_decomp] using hsumA
      exact Nat.add_right_cancel h1
    simpa using this

  have hS₁_sub : S₁ ⊆ S := by
    intro x hx
    have : x ∈ A := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1
    have hA_sub : A ⊆ S := by
      have : A ∈ S.powerset := (Finset.mem_erase.mp (by simpa [T] using hA)).1
      simpa [Finset.mem_powerset] using this
    exact hA_sub this
  have hS₂_sub : S₂ ⊆ S := by
    intro x hx
    have : x ∈ B := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1
    have hB_sub : B ⊆ S := by
      have : B ∈ S.powerset := (Finset.mem_erase.mp (by simpa [T] using hB)).1
      simpa [Finset.mem_powerset] using this
    exact hB_sub this

  have hS₁_ne : S₁.Nonempty := by
    -- if S₁ empty then A ⊆ B; with equal sums implies A=B (distinct elements), contradiction
    by_contra hne
    have hS₁_empty : S₁ = ∅ := Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp hne
    have hA_subB : A ⊆ B := by
      intro x hxA
      by_contra hxB
      have : x ∈ S₁ := by
        refine Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ?_
        refine ⟨hxA, ?_⟩
        have : x ∈ I ↔ x ∈ A ∧ x ∈ B := by simp [I]
        have : x ∈ I := by
          simp [I, hxA, hxB]
        exact this
      simpa [hS₁, hS₁_empty] using this
    have hAB : A = B := by
      apply Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le hA_subB
      have hAcard : A.card ≤ B.card := Finset.card_le_card hA_subB
      exact le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne hAcard (Ne.symm (by
        intro h
        exact hneAB h)))
    exact hneAB hAB

  have hS₂_ne : S₂.Nonempty := by
    -- symmetric argument
    by_contra hne
    have hS₂_empty : S₂ = ∅ := Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp hne
    have hB_subA : B ⊆ A := by
      intro x hxB
      by_contra hxA
      have : x ∈ S₂ := by
        refine Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ?_
        refine ⟨hxB, ?_⟩
        simp [I, hxA, hxB]
      simpa [S₂, hS₂_empty] using this
    have hBA : B = A := by
      apply Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le hB_subA
      have hBcard : B.card ≤ A.card := Finset.card_le_card hB_subA
      exact le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne hBcard (Ne.symm (by
        intro h
        exact hneAB h.symm)))
    exact hneAB hBA.symm

  refine ⟨S₁, S₂, hS₁_ne, hS₁_sub, hS₂_ne, hS₂_sub, hdisj, ?_⟩
  simpa [S₁, S₂] using hsum'

classical
  have hS : ∀ x ∈ S, x ≤ 99 := by
    intro x hx
    have hx' : x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hx
    exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (by simpa [Finset.mem_Ico] using hx'.2) (le_rfl)
  set f : Finset ℕ → ℕ := fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x with hf
  have hfmono : ∀ {A B : Finset ℕ}, A ⊆ B → f A ≤ f B := by
    intro A B hAB
    classical
    have : f A = ∑ x ∈ B, (if x ∈ A then x else 0) := by
      classical
      simp [f, Finset.sum_filter, Finset.filter_mem_eq_inter, Finset.sum_congr, hAB]
    have : f A ≤ ∑ x ∈ B, x := by
      classical
      have hterm : ∀ x ∈ B, (if x ∈ A then x else 0) ≤ x := by
        intro x hx
        by_cases hxA : x ∈ A
        · simp [hxA]
        · simp [hxA]
      simpa [f] using
        (Finset.sum_le_sum fun x hx => hterm x hx)
    simpa [f] using this
  have hmax : ∀ T : Finset ℕ, T ⊆ S → f T ≤ 990 := by
    intro T hTS
    have : f T ≤ ∑ x ∈ T, 99 := by
      classical
      refine Finset.sum_le_sum ?_
      intro x hx
      exact hS x (hTS hx)
    simpa [f, Finset.sum_const_nat, Nat.mul_comm] using this
  have hcard_powerset : S.powerset.card = 2 ^ S.card := by
    simpa using S.card_powerset
  have hlarge : S.powerset.card = 1024 := by
    simpa [hcard_powerset, h₀]
  have hsum_bound : (990 : ℕ) + 1 = 991 := by decide
  have : ∃ A B : Finset ℕ, A ∈ S.powerset ∧ B ∈ S.powerset ∧ A ≠ B ∧ f A = f B := by
    classical
    -- pigeonhole: map 1024 subsets into ≤ 991 sums
    let g : S.powerset → ℕ := fun T => f T.1
    have hg : ∀ T : S.powerset, g T ≤ 990 := by
      intro T
      exact hmax T.1 (by
        have : T.1 ⊆ S := by
          simpa using (Finset.mem_powerset.mp T.2)
        exact this)
    have hcod : (Finset.Icc 0 990).card = 991 := by
      simpa using (Finset.card_Icc (a := 0) (b := 990))
    classical
    have hnotinj : ¬Function.Injective g := by
      intro hinj
      have hle : (S.powerset.card) ≤ (Finset.Icc 0 990).card := by
        classical
        have : (S.powerset.card) ≤ (Finset.image g (Finset.univ : Finset S.powerset)).card := by
          simpa using (Finset.card_image_le.trans le_rfl)
        have himg :
            Finset.image g (Finset.univ : Finset S.powerset) ⊆ Finset.Icc 0 990 := by
          intro y hy
          rcases Finset.mem_image.mp hy with ⟨T, hT, rfl⟩
          have : g T ≤ 990 := hg T
          exact Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ⟨Nat.zero_le _, this⟩
        have : (Finset.image g (Finset.univ : Finset S.powerset)).card ≤
            (Finset.Icc 0 990).card :=
          Finset.card_le_card himg
        exact le_trans (by
          classical
          simpa [Finset.card_image_iff] using
            (Finset.card_image_le (f := g) (s := (Finset.univ : Finset S.powerset))) ) this
      have : (1024 : ℕ) ≤ 991 := by
        simpa [hlarge, hcod] using hle
      decide
    rcases not_forall.mp (by
      classical
      simpa [Function.Injective] using hnotinj) with ⟨A, hA⟩
    rcases not_forall.mp hA with ⟨B, hB⟩
    refine ⟨A.1, B.1, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact A.2
    · exact B.2
    · intro hAB
      apply hB
      simpa [hAB]
    · simpa [g] using (by
        classical
        have := (not_imp_not.mp (by
          intro h
          exact hB (by simpa [g] using h)) ?_ ) )
    · simpa [g] using (by
        classical
        have := (by
          by_contra h
          exact hB (by
            intro hEq
            exact h (by simpa [g] using hEq)))
        exact this)
  rcases this with ⟨A, B, hA, hB, hne, hsum⟩
  have hAsub : A ⊆ S := Finset.mem_powerset.mp hA
  have hBsub : B ⊆ S := Finset.mem_powerset.mp hB
  have hdiff_nonempty : (A \ B).Nonempty ∨ (B \ A).Nonempty := by
    by_cases hAB : A ⊆ B
    · right
      have : B \ A ≠ ∅ := by
        intro h
        have : B ⊆ A := by
          intro x hx
          have : x ∈ B \ A := by
            refine Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ?_
            refine ⟨hx, ?_⟩
            intro hxA
            have : x ∈ A := hxA
            exact False.elim (by
              have := Finset.ext_iff.mp (by simpa [h] using rfl) x
              exact (by
                have := this.mp (by simp [Finset.mem_sdiff, hx, hxA])
                simp at this))
          simpa [h] using this
        have : A = B := Finset.Subset.antisymm hAB this
        exact hne this
      exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr this
    · left
      have : A \ B ≠ ∅ := by
        intro h
        have : A ⊆ B := by
          intro x hx
          by_contra hxB
          have : x ∈ A \ B := by
            exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hx, hxB⟩
          simpa [h] using this
        exact hAB this
      exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr this
  wlog hN : (A \ B).Nonempty generalizing A B with
  | _ =>
    cases hdiff_nonempty with
    | inl h => exact this h
    | inr h =>
      have := this (A := B) (B := A) hB hA (by simpa [and_left_comm, and_assoc] using ⟨hne.symm, hsum.symm⟩) h
      simpa [Finset.sdiff_sdiff_comm] using this
  refine ⟨A \ B, B \ A, hN, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact Finset.sdiff_subset.trans hAsub
  · have : (B \ A).Nonempty := by
      have : A ≠ B := hne
      by_cases hBA : B ⊆ A
      · have : A \ B ≠ ∅ := by
          intro h
          have : A ⊆ B := by
            intro x hx
            by_contra hxB
            have : x ∈ A \ B := Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hx, hxB⟩
            simpa [h] using this
          have : A = B := Finset.Subset.antisymm this hBA
          exact this.elim this
        exact False.elim (by
          have : A = B := Finset.Subset.antisymm (by
            intro x hx
            by_cases hxB : x ∈ B
            · exact hxB
            · have : x ∈ A \ B := Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hx, hxB⟩
              exact False.elim (by
                have : (A \ B).Nonempty := hN
                have := Finset.Nonempty.ne_empty this
                exact this (by
                  classical
                  simpa using this)))
            hBA
          exact hne this)

  have hS : S ⊆ Finset.Icc 10 99 := by

  have hS : S.card = 10 := h₀

      -- A simple bound: sum ≤ 99+98+...+90 = 945 since S has 10 distinct elements ≤ 99 and ≥ 10.
      -- We prove by injecting S into {90,91,...,99} via order and use sum monotonicity.
      -- Use a crude but valid bound: since x ≤ 99 and card=10 ⇒ sum ≤ 10*99=990, then use 945 by arithmetic with distinctness not available.

          have : x < 100 := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hx').2

          intro x hx

    -- all values are in `Icc 0 990`, which has `991` elements

        Finset.image f (S.powerset) ⊆ Finset.Icc 0 990 := by
      intro y hy
      rcases Finset.mem_image.mp hy with ⟨T, hT, rfl⟩
      have : f T ≤ 990 := hf_range T

      simpa using (Finset.card_Icc 0 990))

    intro hinj

      simpa [Finset.card_image_iff] using (Finset.card_image_le_of_injective _ (by
        intro a b hab
        exact hinj hab))

      exact le_trans (by simpa [hcardPow] using this) hfinite
    exact Nat.not_succ_le_self 991 (by
      have : 992 ≤ 1024 := by decide
      exact le_trans this (by simpa using this))

      -- extract collision from non-injectivity
      classical
      simpa [Function.Injective] using hnot_inj) with ⟨A, hA⟩
  rcases not_forall.mp hA with ⟨B, hAB⟩
  have hAin : A ∈ S.powerset := by
    classical
    by_contra h
    exact hAB (by simp [h])
  have hBin : B ∈ S.powerset := by
    classical
    by_contra h
    exact hAB (by simp [h])
  have hneq : A ≠ B := by
    classical
    intro hEq
    exact hAB (by simpa [hEq])
  have hsumEq : (∑ x ∈ (A : Finset ℕ), x) = ∑ x ∈ (B : Finset ℕ), x := by
    classical
    have : f ⟨A, hAin⟩ = f ⟨B, hBin⟩ := by
      have : ¬ (f ⟨A, hAin⟩ ≠ f ⟨B, hBin⟩) := by
        intro hne
        exact hAB (by
          have : (⟨A, hAin⟩ : S.powerset) ≠ ⟨B, hBin⟩ := by
            intro h'
            exact hneq (by cases h'; rfl)
          exact Or.inl ⟨this, hne⟩)
      exact eq_of_not_ne this
    simpa [f] using this
  -- Use symmetric difference: take `S₁ = A \ B` and `S₂ = B \ A`.
  let S₁ : Finset ℕ := A \ B
  let S₂ : Finset ℕ := B \ A
  have hdis : Disjoint S₁ S₂ := by
    classical
    exact Finset.disjoint_left.mpr (by
      intro x hx1 hx2
      have hxA : x ∈ A := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx1).1
      have hxB : x ∈ B := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx2).1
      have hxnotB : x ∉ B := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx1).2
      exact hxnotB hxB)
  have hsum_sdiff :
      (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) = ∑ x ∈ S₂, x := by
    classical
    -- from equal sums of A and B, cancel intersection
    have hA : (∑ x ∈ (A : Finset ℕ), x) =
        (∑ x ∈ (A ∩ B), x) + (∑ x ∈ (A \ B), x) := by
      simpa [Finset.sum_union, Finset.inter_union_sdiff, Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter] using
        (Finset.sum_union (s := A ∩ B) (t := A \ B) (by
          exact Finset.disjoint_left.mpr (by
            intro x hxI hxD
            exact (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hxD).2 ((Finset.mem_inter.mp hxI).2))))
    have hB : (∑ x ∈ (B : Finset ℕ), x) =
        (∑ x ∈ (A ∩ B), x) + (∑ x ∈ (B \ A), x) := by
      have : (A ∩ B) = (B ∩ A) := by
        ext x; simp [Finset.mem_inter, and_left_comm, and_assoc, and_comm]
      simpa [Finset.sum_union, Finset.inter_union_sdiff, Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter, this] using
        (Finset.sum_union (s := B ∩ A) (t := B \ A) (by
          exact Finset.disjoint_left.mpr (by
            intro x hxI hxD
            exact (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hxD).2 ((Finset.mem_inter.mp hxI).2))))
    have := congrArg (fun z => z - ∑ x ∈ (A ∩ B), x) hsumEq
    -- rewrite sums using decompositions
    simp [hA, hB, Nat.add_sub_cancel_left] at this
    simpa [S₁, S₂] using this
  have hne1 : S₁.Nonempty ∨ S₂.Nonempty := by
    classical
    by_contra h
    have h1 : ¬ S₁.Nonempty := by
      intro hn; exact h (Or.inl hn)
    have h2 : ¬ S₂.Nonempty := by
      intro hn; exact h (Or.inr hn)
    have hS₁ : S₁ = ∅ := Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h1
    have hS₂ : S₂ = ∅ := Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h2
    have : A = B := by
      apply Finset.ext
      intro x
      constructor
      · intro hxA
        by_contra hxB
        have : x ∈ S₁ := by
          exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hxA, hxB⟩
        simpa [S₁, hS₁] using this
      · intro hxB
        by_contra hxA
        have : x ∈ S₂ := by
          exact Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨hxB, hxA⟩
        simpa [S₂, hS₂] using this

  have hS₁sub : S₁ ⊆ S := by
    intro x hx
    have hxA : x ∈ A := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1
    exact (Finset.mem_powerset.mp hAin) hxA
  have hS₂sub : S₂ ⊆ S := by
    intro x hx
    have hxB : x ∈ B := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1
    exact (Finset.mem_powerset.mp hBin) hxB
  rcases hne1 with hne1 | hne2
  · refine ⟨S₁, S₂, hne1, hS₁sub, ?_, hS₂sub, hdis, ?_⟩
    · -- show S₂ nonempty from sum equality and S₁ nonempty? Not needed; use `hne1` branch could still have S₂ empty, so pick swapped if needed
      by_cases hS₂e : S₂ = ∅
      · have : (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) = 0 := by simpa [hS₂e] using hsum_sdiff
        have : False := by
          rcases hne1 with ⟨x, hx⟩
          have hxpos : 0 < x := by
            have hxS : x ∈ S := hS₁sub hx
            have hxI : x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hxS
            exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : 0 < 10) (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hxI).1
          have : 0 < ∑ y ∈ S₁, y := by
            exact lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hxpos (le_of_eq rfl)) (by
              -- `x` is one term in the sum
              exact Finset.single_le_sum (fun y hy => Nat.zero_le _) hx)
          exact (Nat.ne_of_lt this) (by simpa using this)
        exact False.elim this
      · exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hS₂e
    · exact hsum_sdiff
  · refine ⟨S₂, S₁, hne2, hS₂sub, ?_, hS₁sub, ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr (by
        intro hS₁e
        have : S₁.Nonempty ∨ S₂.Nonempty := Or.inr hne2
        exact (by
          -- contradiction to earlier proof that at least one nonempty if S₁ empty? not needed
          simpa [hS₁e] using (Or.inr hne2)))
    · simpa [S₁, S₂, Finset.disjoint_left] using hdis.symm
    · simpa [S₁, S₂] using hsum_sdiff.symm

classical
  have hS0 : S.Nonempty := by
    by_contra h
    have : S.card = 0 := Finset.card_eq_zero.mpr (Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h)
    exact (by simpa [h₀] using this)
  let n := (S.card)
  have hn : n = 10 := h₀
  have hsum_le : ∀ T : Finset ℕ, T ⊆ S → (∑ x ∈ T, x) ≤ 990 := by
    intro T hTS
    have hle : ∀ x ∈ T, x ≤ 99 := by
      intro x hx
      have hxS : x ∈ S := hTS hx
      have hxI : x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hxS
      exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hxI).2
    have : (∑ x ∈ T, x) ≤ ∑ x ∈ T, 99 := by
      exact Finset.sum_le_sum (by
        intro x hx
        exact hle x hx)
    simpa using (le_trans this (by
      have : (∑ _x ∈ T, 99) = 99 * T.card := by
        simp [Finset.sum_const_nat]
      -- 99 * |T| ≤ 99 * 10 = 990
      have hcard : T.card ≤ 10 := by
        simpa [hn] using Finset.card_le_card hTS
      have : 99 * T.card ≤ 99 * 10 := Nat.mul_le_mul_left 99 hcard
      simpa [this, hn] using this))
  -- consider all nonempty subsets and their sums; pigeonhole with bound 990
  let A : Finset (Finset ℕ) := S.powerset.erase ∅
  have hAcard : A.card = 1023 := by
    have : (S.powerset.erase ∅).card = S.powerset.card - 1 := by
      simpa [Finset.card_erase_of_mem] using (Finset.card_erase_of_mem (by simp))
    -- powerset card = 2^|S|
    simp [A, this, h₀]
  have hAne : A.Nonempty := by
    rcases hS0 with ⟨a, ha⟩
    refine ⟨{a}, ?_⟩
    simp [A, ha]
  -- map each subset to its sum
  have hrange : ∀ T ∈ A, (∑ x ∈ T, x) ∈ Finset.Icc 10 990 := by
    intro T hT
    have hTS : T ⊆ S := by
      have : T ∈ S.powerset := by
        have : T ∈ S.powerset.erase ∅ := by simpa [A] using hT
        exact (Finset.mem_erase.mp this).2
      exact Finset.mem_powerset.mp this
    have hTne : T.Nonempty := by
      have : T ≠ ∅ := by
        have : T ∈ S.powerset.erase ∅ := by simpa [A] using hT
        exact (Finset.mem_erase.mp this).1
      exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr this
    have hlow : 10 ≤ (∑ x ∈ T, x) := by
      rcases hTne with ⟨a, haT⟩
      have haS : a ∈ S := hTS haT
      have haI : a ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ haS
      have ha10 : 10 ≤ a := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp haI).1
      have hsum_ge : a ≤ ∑ x ∈ T, x := by
        simpa [Finset.sum_eq_add_sum_diff_singleton haT] using Nat.le_add_right a (∑ x ∈ T \ {a}, x)
      exact le_trans ha10 hsum_ge
    have hupp : (∑ x ∈ T, x) ≤ 990 := hsum_le T hTS
    exact by
      simp [Finset.mem_Icc, hlow, hupp]
  -- pigeonhole: two distinct subsets in A with same sum
  have : ∃ T₁ ∈ A, ∃ T₂ ∈ A, T₁ ≠ T₂ ∧ (∑ x ∈ T₁, x) = (∑ x ∈ T₂, x) := by
    -- codomain has 981 possible sums (10..990)
    have hcod : (Finset.Icc 10 990).card = 981 := by
      simp
    have hgt : (Finset.Icc 10 990).card < A.card := by
      -- 981 < 1023
      simpa [hAcard, hcod]
    classical
    -- use finite pigeonhole via card_image_lt
    have himage : (A.image fun T => (∑ x ∈ T, x)).card ≤ (Finset.Icc 10 990).card := by
      refine le_trans (Finset.card_image_le) ?_
      refine Finset.card_le_card ?_
      intro s hs
      rcases Finset.mem_image.mp hs with ⟨T, hT, rfl⟩
      exact hrange T hT

    rcases Finset.exists_ne_of_one_lt_card (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.zero_lt_iff.mpr (Nat.ne_of_gt hnotinj))) (le_of_lt hnotinj)) (le_of_eq rfl)) with ⟨T₁, hT₁, T₂, hT₂, hne⟩
    -- extract equality of sums from image collision
    have hsumeq : (∑ x ∈ T₁, x) = (∑ x ∈ T₂, x) := by
      have : (fun T => (∑ x ∈ T, x)) T₁ = (fun T => (∑ x ∈ T, x)) T₂ := by
        -- if image card < domain card then map not injective on A
        classical
        have hnotinj' : ¬ Set.InjOn (fun T : Finset ℕ => (∑ x ∈ T, x)) (fun T => T ∈ A) := by
          intro hinj
          have : (A.image fun T : Finset ℕ => (∑ x ∈ T, x)).card = A.card := by
            exact Finset.card_image_iff.mpr (by
              intro a ha b hb hab
              exact hinj ha hb hab)

        -- use not injOn to get collision

        rcases not_forall.mp ha with ⟨haA, hb⟩
        rcases not_forall.mp hb with ⟨b, hbA, hneq⟩
        rcases not_imp.mp hneq with ⟨hneab, heq⟩
        -- choose our already picked distinct elements to be those

        -- but we already have T₁,T₂; conclude by contradiction with injectivity on {T₁,T₂}
        by_contra h
        have hinj2 : (T₁ ∈ A ∧ T₂ ∈ A ∧ T₁ ≠ T₂) → (∑ x ∈ T₁, x) ≠ (∑ x ∈ T₂, x) := by
          intro h'; exact h
        exact (hinj2 ⟨hT₁, hT₂, hne⟩) rfl
      exact this
    exact ⟨T₁, hT₁, T₂, hT₂, hne, hsumeq⟩
  rcases this with ⟨T₁, hT₁, T₂, hT₂, hne, hsumeq⟩
  -- make them disjoint by taking differences from intersection
  let I := T₁ ∩ T₂
  let S₁ := T₁ \ I
  let S₂ := T₂ \ I
  have hdis : Disjoint S₁ S₂ := by
    refine Finset.disjoint_left.2 ?_
    intro x hx1 hx2
    have hxI1 : x ∉ I := by
      exact Finset.not_mem_of_mem_diff hx1
    have hxI2 : x ∉ I := by
      exact Finset.not_mem_of_mem_diff hx2
    have hxT1 : x ∈ T₁ := (Finset.mem_diff.mp hx1).1
    have hxT2 : x ∈ T₂ := (Finset.mem_diff.mp hx2).1
    have : x ∈ I := by simp [I, hxT1, hxT2]
    exact hxI1 this
  have hsumdiff : (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) = (∑ x ∈ S₂, x) := by
    -- cancel sums over intersection
    have hsubset1 : I ⊆ T₁ := Finset.inter_subset_left
    have hsubset2 : I ⊆ T₂ := Finset.inter_subset_right
    have hdecomp1 : (∑ x ∈ T₁, x) = (∑ x ∈ I, x) + (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) := by
      simpa [S₁, I, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using
        (Finset.sum_eq_sum_inter_add_sum_diff (T := T₁) (U := T₂) (f := fun x => x))
    have hdecomp2 : (∑ x ∈ T₂, x) = (∑ x ∈ I, x) + (∑ x ∈ S₂, x) := by
      simpa [S₂, I, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using
        (Finset.sum_eq_sum_inter_add_sum_diff (T := T₂) (U := T₁) (f := fun x => x))
    -- use hsumeq
    have := congrArg id hsumeq
    -- rewrite and cancel
    have : (∑ x ∈ I, x) + (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) = (∑ x ∈ I, x) + (∑ x ∈ S₂, x) := by
      simpa [hdecomp1, hdecomp2] using hsumeq
    exact Nat.add_left_cancel this
  have hS1sub : S₁ ⊆ S := by
    intro x hx
    have hxT : x ∈ T₁ := (Finset.mem_diff.mp hx).1
    have hT1S : T₁ ⊆ S := by
      have : T₁ ∈ S.powerset := (Finset.mem_erase.mp (by simpa [A] using hT₁)).2
      exact Finset.mem_powerset.mp this
    exact hT1S hxT
  have hS2sub : S₂ ⊆ S := by
    intro x hx
    have hxT : x ∈ T₂ := (Finset.mem_diff.mp hx).1
    have hT2S : T₂ ⊆ S := by
      have : T₂ ∈ S.powerset := (Finset.mem_erase.mp (by simpa [A] using hT₂)).2
      exact Finset.mem_powerset.mp this
    exact hT2S hxT
  have hS1ne : S₁.Nonempty := by
    by_contra h
    have hS1empty : S₁ = ∅ := Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h
    have hsub : T₁ ⊆ T₂ := by
      intro x hx
      by_contra hx2
      have : x ∈ S₁ := by
        have : x ∉ I := by
          intro hxI
          have : x ∈ T₂ := (Finset.mem_inter.mp hxI).2
          exact hx2 this
        exact Finset.mem_diff.mpr ⟨hx, this⟩
      simpa [hS1empty] using this
    have hsub' : T₂ ⊆ T₁ := by
      -- symmetric using sums equality and strictness not needed; instead use hne with cardinal?
      -- use same argument: if S₁ empty then T₁ ⊆ T₂; but if also S₂ empty then equal; else disjoint sets exist already
      intro x hx
      by_contra hx1
      have : x ∈ S₂ := by
        have : x ∉ I := by
          intro hxI
          have : x ∈ T₁ := (Finset.mem_inter.mp hxI).1

        exact Finset.mem_diff.mpr ⟨hx, this⟩

      -- easier: if S₁ empty, then sumdiff gives sum over S₂ = 0, hence S₂ empty, hence T₁=T₂ contradict hne
      have hsum0 : (∑ x ∈ S₂, x) = 0 := by
        have : (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) = 0 := by simp [hS1empty]

          have hyI : y ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hyS
          exact Nat.ne_of_gt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by exact (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hyI).1) (by decide)))

          have : y ≤ ∑ z ∈ S₂, z := by
            simpa [Finset.sum_eq_add_sum_diff_singleton hy] using

          exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (by exact Nat.zero_lt_of_lt this)
        exact (by simpa [hsum0] using this).false.elim
      have : x ∈ T₁ := by
        have hxT2 : x ∈ T₂ := hx
        have hxnotI : x ∉ I := by
          intro hxI; exact hx1 (Finset.mem_inter.mp hxI).1
        have : x ∈ S₂ := Finset.mem_diff.mpr ⟨hxT2, hxnotI⟩
        simpa [hS2empty] using this

    exact hne this
  have hS2ne : S₂.Nonempty := by
    have : (∑ x ∈ S₂, x) = (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) := by simpa [hsumdiff] using (Eq.symm hsumdiff)
    -- since S₁ nonempty and all elements ≥ 10, sum>0 hence S₂ nonempty
    by_contra h
    have hS2empty : S₂ = ∅ := Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h
    have : (∑ x ∈ S₂, x) = 0 := by simp [hS2empty]
    have : (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) = 0 := by simpa [hsumdiff, this] using rfl
    rcases hS1ne with ⟨a, ha⟩
    have haS : a ∈ S := hS1sub ha
    have haI : a ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ haS
    have ha10 : 10 ≤ a := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp haI).1
    have hpos : 0 < (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) := by

    exact (by simpa [this] using hpos).false.elim
  refine ⟨S₁, S₂, hS1ne, hS1sub, hS2ne, hS2sub, hdis, hsumdiff⟩

classical
  obtain ⟨T, hTsub, hTcard⟩ : ∃ T : Finset ℕ, T ⊆ S ∧ T.card = 9 := by
    rcases S.card_pos.2 (by simpa [h₀] : 0 < S.card) with ⟨a, haS⟩
    refine ⟨S.erase a, Finset.erase_subset _ _, ?_⟩
    simpa [Finset.card_erase_of_mem haS, h₀]
  set U : Finset ℕ := T.powerset.erase ∅ with hU
  have hUsub : U ⊆ T.powerset := by
    intro A hA
    exact Finset.mem_powerset.1 (Finset.mem_of_mem_erase hA)
  have hUnonempty : ∀ {A : Finset ℕ}, A ∈ U → A.Nonempty := by
    intro A hA
    have hA' : A ≠ ∅ := by
      exact Finset.ne_of_mem_erase hA
    exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.2 hA'
  have hUcard : U.card = 511 := by
    have : (T.powerset.erase ∅).card = T.powerset.card - 1 := by
      simpa [Finset.card_erase_of_mem] using (Finset.card_erase_of_mem (by simp))
    have hpow : T.powerset.card = 2 ^ T.card := by simpa using Finset.card_powerset T
    have : U.card = T.powerset.card - 1 := by
      simpa [hU] using (Finset.card_erase_of_mem (by simp : (∅ : Finset ℕ) ∈ T.powerset))
    simp [this, hpow, hTcard]
  have hsum_bounds :
      ∀ {A : Finset ℕ}, A ⊆ S → (∑ x ∈ A, x) ≤ 99 * A.card := by
    intro A hAsub
    classical
    refine Finset.sum_le_sum ?_
    intro x hx
    have hxS : x ∈ S := hAsub hx
    have hxI : x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hxS
    have hxlt : x < 100 := (Finset.mem_Ico.1 hxI).2
    have : x ≤ 99 := Nat.le_of_lt_succ (by simpa using hxlt)
    exact le_trans this (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right (Nat.succ_pos _))
  have hsum_upper :
      ∀ {A : Finset ℕ}, A ∈ U → (∑ x ∈ A, x) ≤ 891 := by
    intro A hA
    have hA_T : A ⊆ T := Finset.mem_powerset.1 (hUsub hA)
    have hA_S : A ⊆ S := fun x hx => hTsub (hA_T hx)

      have h1 : (A \ B) = ∅ := by
        simpa [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] using (not_or.mp h').1
      have h2 : (B \ A) = ∅ := by
        simpa [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] using (not_or.mp h').2

          by_contra h0

                exact this.1)

              have hAdecomp : A = (A ∩ B) ∪ (A \ B) := by
                ext y; by_cases hyA : y ∈ A <;> by_cases hyB : y ∈ B <;> simp [hyA, hyB, Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_inter]

    intro x hx
    have : x ∈ A := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1
    have hAsub : A ⊆ S := by
      have : A ∈ S.powerset := (Finset.mem_erase.mp (by simpa [T] using hA)).2

  · have : (B \ A).Nonempty := by
      have hBne : B.Nonempty := by
        have : B ∈ S.powerset.erase (∅ : Finset ℕ) := by simpa [T] using hB

          rcases not_forall.mp hABfalse with ⟨x, hx⟩
          rcases not_imp.mp hx with ⟨hxA, hxB⟩
          have hxpos : 0 < x := by
            have hxS : x ∈ S := (by
              have hAsub : A ⊆ S := by
                have : A ∈ S.powerset := (Finset.mem_erase.mp (by simpa [T] using hA)).2
                simpa [Finset.mem_powerset] using this

            have : 10 ≤ x := (by
              have : 10 ≤ x ∧ x < 100 := by simpa [Finset.mem_Ico] using hxI

              intro y hy1 hy2
              have : y ∈ B := (Finset.mem_inter.mp hy1).2
              exact (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hy2).2 this)
          have hAdecomp : A = (A ∩ B) ∪ (A \ B) := by
            ext y; by_cases hyA : y ∈ A <;> by_cases hyB : y ∈ B <;> simp [hyA, hyB, Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_inter]

        intro x hx
        by_contra hxB
        have : x ∈ A \ B := by simpa [Finset.mem_sdiff, hx, hxB]
        have : False := by
          -- then sums would differ since B ⊆ A and positive extra

            have : x ∈ A := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp this).1

    intro x hx
    have : x ∈ B := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1
    have hBsub : B ⊆ S := by
      have : B ∈ S.powerset := (Finset.mem_erase.mp (by simpa [T] using hB)).2

        intro y hy1 hy2
        have : y ∈ A := (Finset.mem_inter.mp hy1).1

      ext y; by_cases hyA : y ∈ A <;> by_cases hyB : y ∈ B <;> simp [hyA, hyB, Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_inter]

      ext y; by_cases hyB : y ∈ B <;> by_cases hyA : y ∈ A <;> simp [hyB, hyA, Finset.mem_sdiff, Finset.mem_inter]

        simpa [hsumA, hsumB] using this

classical
  -- Consider all nonempty subsets of `S`.
  let A : Finset (Finset ℕ) := (S.powerset.erase ∅)
  have hA_nonempty : A.Nonempty := by
    rcases (Finset.card_pos.mp (by simpa [h₀] using (show 0 < S.card from by omega))) with ⟨a, ha⟩
    refine ⟨{a}, ?_⟩
    have : ({a} : Finset ℕ) ⊆ S := by
      intro x hx
      simpa [Finset.mem_singleton] using (by
        have : x = a := by simpa [Finset.mem_singleton] using hx
        subst this; exact ha)
    have hmem : ({a} : Finset ℕ) ∈ S.powerset := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_powerset] using this
    refine Finset.mem_erase.mpr ?_
    refine ⟨hmem, by simp⟩
  -- Bound sums of nonempty subsets: each element in `S` is ≤ 99, and subset has ≤ 10 elements.
  have hsum_le : ∀ T : Finset ℕ, T ⊆ S → (∑ x ∈ T, x) ≤ 990 := by
    intro T hTS
    have hcard : T.card ≤ 10 := by
      simpa [h₀] using (Finset.card_le_card hTS)
    have hxle : ∀ x ∈ T, x ≤ 99 := by
      intro x hx
      have hxS : x ∈ S := hTS hx
      have hxI : x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hxS
      have : x < 100 := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hxI).2
      exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (by simpa using this)
    have : (∑ x ∈ T, x) ≤ ∑ _x ∈ T, 99 := by
      exact Finset.sum_le_sum fun x hx => hxle x hx
    have hsum99 : (∑ _x ∈ T, 99) = 99 * T.card := by
      simp [Finset.sum_const, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc]
    have : (∑ x ∈ T, x) ≤ 99 * T.card := by simpa [hsum99] using this
    have : 99 * T.card ≤ 99 * 10 := by exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left 99 hcard
    have : (∑ x ∈ T, x) ≤ 99 * 10 := le_trans this.1 this
    simpa using this
  -- There are 2^10 - 1 = 1023 nonempty subsets but only sums 0..990 (991 values): pigeonhole.
  have hcardA : A.card = 1023 := by
    have : (S.powerset.card) = 2 ^ S.card := by simpa using (Finset.card_powerset S)
    have hpow : 2 ^ S.card = 1024 := by simpa [h₀]
    have hp : S.powerset.card = 1024 := by simpa [this] using hpow
    have hempty : (∅ : Finset ℕ) ∈ S.powerset := by
      simp [Finset.mem_powerset]
    have : (S.powerset.erase ∅).card = S.powerset.card - 1 := by
      simpa [Finset.card_erase_of_mem hempty]
    have : A.card = 1024 - 1 := by simpa [A, hp] using this

    exact this

  let f : Finset ℕ → ℕ := fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x
  have hf_range : ∀ T ∈ A, f T ≤ 990 := by
    intro T hT
    have hTS : T ⊆ S := by
      have : T ∈ S.powerset := (Finset.mem_erase.mp hT).1
      simpa [Finset.mem_powerset] using this

  let B : Finset ℕ := Finset.Icc 0 990

    simpa [B] using Finset.card_Icc (a := 0) (b := 990)

    intro T hT

            have : y ∈ S₁ := by

                exact False.elim (hyT (by

    have : ∑ x ∈ S₂, x = 0 := by simp [hS₂empty]
    have : ∑ x ∈ S₁, x = 0 := by simpa [hsum_eq] using this.symm

classical
  have hSnon : S.Nonempty := by
    by_contra h
    have : S.card = 0 := Finset.card_eq_zero.mpr (Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h)

  -- Let A be the set of nonempty subsets of S.
  let A : Finset (Finset ℕ) := (S.powerset.erase ∅)
  have hA : ∀ T ∈ A, T ⊆ S := by
    intro T hT
    have hT' : T ∈ S.powerset := by
      have : T ∈ S.powerset.erase ∅ := hT
      exact (Finset.mem_erase.mp this).2

    intro T hT
    have : T ≠ ∅ := (Finset.mem_erase.mp hT).1
    exact Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.2 this
  -- Count: there are 2^10 - 1 nonempty subsets.
  have hcardA : A.card = 2 ^ S.card - 1 := by
    have : (S.powerset.erase (∅ : Finset ℕ)).card = S.powerset.card - 1 := by
      have hempty : (∅ : Finset ℕ) ∈ S.powerset := by
        simpa using (Finset.empty_mem_powerset : (∅ : Finset ℕ) ∈ S.powerset)
      simpa [Finset.card_erase_of_mem hempty]
    simpa [A, Finset.card_powerset] using this
  have hcardA' : A.card = 1023 := by
    -- 2^10 - 1 = 1023
    simpa [h₀] using hcardA
  -- Each sum is between 10 and 10*99 = 990, hence at most 981 possible values for nonempty subsets.
  have hsum_range :
      ∀ T ∈ A, (10 : ℕ) ≤ ∑ x ∈ T, x ∧ ∑ x ∈ T, x ≤ 990 := by
    intro T hT
    have hTsub : T ⊆ S := hA T hT
    have hTne : T.Nonempty := hAne T hT
    rcases hTne with ⟨t, htT⟩
    have htS : t ∈ S := hTsub htT
    have htI : t ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ htS
    have htge : (10 : ℕ) ≤ t := by
      exact (Finset.mem_Ico.mp htI).1
    have htle : t ≤ 99 := by
      have : t < 100 := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp htI).2
      exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (by simpa using this)

          (Nat.le_add_right t (∑ x ∈ T.erase t, x))
      exact le_trans htge this

        have hxI : x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hxS
        have : x < 100 := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp hxI).2
        exact Nat.le_of_lt_succ (by simpa using this)

        have : T.card ≤ S.card := Finset.card_le_card hTsub
        simpa [h₀] using this

      have : 99 * T.card ≤ 990 := by simpa using this
      exact le_trans (le_trans hsum_le' (by simpa [this])) (by simpa using this)
    exact ⟨hsum_ge, hsum_le⟩

  let f : (Finset ℕ) → ℕ := fun T => ∑ x ∈ T, x
  have hcod : ∀ T ∈ A, f T ∈ Finset.Icc 10 990 := by
    intro T hT
    rcases hsum_range T hT with ⟨hlo, hhi⟩
    exact Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ⟨hlo, hhi⟩

    simp
  have hlarge : A.card > (Finset.Icc 10 990).card := by
    -- 1023 > 981
    simpa [hcardA', hcardCod]

  rcases hex with ⟨T₁, hT₁A, T₂, hT₂A, hne, hsum⟩
  -- Let S₁ = T₁ \ T₂ and S₂ = T₂ \ T₁; they are disjoint and have equal sum.
  let S₁ : Finset ℕ := T₁ \ T₂
  let S₂ : Finset ℕ := T₂ \ T₁

    refine Finset.disjoint_left.2 ?_

        _ = (∑ x ∈ (T₂ \ T₁), x) + (∑ x ∈ (T₁ ∩ T₂), x) := by

    have hT1ne : T₁.Nonempty := hAne T₁ hT₁A
    have hT2ne : T₂.Nonempty := hAne T₂ hT₂A

        (Finset.image (fun U : {U // U ∈ A} => f U.1) (Finset.univ)).card ≤ 990 := by

      have : (Finset.image (fun U : {U // U ∈ A} => f U.1) (Finset.univ)) ⊆ Finset.image f A := by
        intro s hs
        rcases Finset.mem_image.mp hs with ⟨U, -, rfl⟩
        refine Finset.mem_image.mpr ?_
        exact ⟨U.1, U.2, rfl⟩
      exact le_trans (Finset.card_le_card this) hcard_range
    have : (1023 : ℕ) ≤ 990 := by
      have := le_trans (by
        -- rewrite via card equalities
        simpa [this, hcard_univ, hAcard] using congrArg (fun n => n) this.symm) him
      exact this
    exact (by decide : ¬(1023 : ℕ) ≤ 990) this
  rcases not_forall.mp (by
    simpa [Function.Injective] using hnot_inj) with ⟨U, hU⟩
  rcases not_forall.mp hU with ⟨V, hV⟩
  have hUVne : U ≠ V := by
    intro hEq
    have := hV (by simpa [hEq])
    exact this
  have hsum : f U.1 = f V.1 := by
    by_contra hneq
    exact hV (by exact hneq)
  -- Let S₁ = U \ V, S₂ = V \ U
  refine ⟨U.1 \ V.1, V.1 \ U.1, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · have : (U.1 \ V.1).Nonempty := by
      have hUn : U.1.Nonempty := (hfA U.1 U.2).2
      rcases hUn with ⟨x, hx⟩
      by_cases hxV : x ∈ V.1
      · -- use U≠V to get some element in symmetric difference; pick from V similarly
        have hVn : V.1.Nonempty := (hfA V.1 V.2).2
        rcases hVn with ⟨y, hy⟩
        by_cases hyU : y ∈ U.1
        · have : U.1 = V.1 := by
            ext z; constructor <;> intro hz
            · by_cases hzV : z ∈ V.1
              · exact hzV
              · have : z ∈ U.1 \ V.1 := by exact ⟨hz, hzV⟩
                cases this.2
            · by_cases hzU : z ∈ U.1
              · exact hzU
              · have : z ∈ V.1 \ U.1 := by exact ⟨hz, hzU⟩
                cases this.2
          exact (hUVne (Subtype.ext (by simpa [this])))
        · exact ⟨y, by exact ⟨hy, hyU⟩⟩
      · exact ⟨x, ⟨hx, hxV⟩⟩
    exact this
  · intro x hx
    exact (hfA U.1 U.2).1 (by exact (Finset.mem_of_mem_sdiff hx))
  · have : (V.1 \ U.1).Nonempty := by
      have hVn : V.1.Nonempty := (hfA V.1 V.2).2
      rcases hVn with ⟨x, hx⟩
      by_cases hxU : x ∈ U.1
      · have hUn : U.1.Nonempty := (hfA U.1 U.2).2
        rcases hUn with ⟨y, hy⟩
        by_cases hyV : y ∈ V.1
        · have : U.1 = V.1 := by
            ext z; constructor <;> intro hz
            · by_cases hzV : z ∈ V.1
              · exact hzV
              · have : z ∈ U.1 \ V.1 := by exact ⟨hz, hzV⟩
                cases this.2
            · by_cases hzU : z ∈ U.1
              · exact hzU
              · have : z ∈ V.1 \ U.1 := by exact ⟨hz, hzU⟩
                cases this.2
          exact (hUVne (Subtype.ext (by simpa [this])))
        · exact ⟨y, by exact ⟨hy, hyV⟩⟩
      · exact ⟨x, ⟨hx, hxU⟩⟩
    exact this
  · intro x hx
    exact (hfA V.1 V.2).1 (by exact (Finset.mem_of_mem_sdiff hx))
  · exact Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff
  · -- sums equal since common intersection cancels
    have hdecompU :
        (∑ x ∈ U.1, x) = (∑ x ∈ (U.1 \ V.1), x) + (∑ x ∈ (U.1 ∩ V.1), x) := by
      simpa [Finset.sum_union, Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter, Finset.sdiff_union_inter] using
        (Finset.sum_sdiff_add_sum_inter (s := U.1) (t := V.1) (f := fun x => x))
    have hdecompV :
        (∑ x ∈ V.1, x) = (∑ x ∈ (V.1 \ U.1), x) + (∑ x ∈ (U.1 ∩ V.1), x) := by
      have : V.1 ∩ U.1 = U.1 ∩ V.1 := by
        ext x; simp [and_left_comm, and_comm, and_assoc]
      simpa [this, Finset.sum_union, Finset.disjoint_sdiff_inter, Finset.sdiff_union_inter] using
        (Finset.sum_sdiff_add_sum_inter (s := V.1) (t := U.1) (f := fun x => x))
    have := congrArg (fun n => n) hsum
    -- cancel intersection sum
    have hI :
        (∑ x ∈ (U.1 ∩ V.1), x) ≤ (∑ x ∈ U.1, x) := by
      exact Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset_of_nonneg (by
        intro x hx; exact (Finset.mem_inter.mp hx).1) (by intro; exact Nat.zero_le _)
    have :
        (∑ x ∈ (U.1 \ V.1), x) = (∑ x ∈ (V.1 \ U.1), x) := by
      have hu := hdecompU
      have hv := hdecompV
      -- rewrite and use Nat.add_left_cancel
      have : (∑ x ∈ (U.1 \ V.1), x) + (∑ x ∈ (U.1 ∩ V.1), x) =
              (∑ x ∈ (V.1 \ U.1), x) + (∑ x ∈ (U.1 ∩ V.1), x) := by
        simpa [hu, hv] using this
      exact Nat.add_right_cancel this
    simpa [f] using this

classical
  have hS : S ⊆ Finset.Icc 10 99 := by
    intro x hx
    have hx' := h₁ hx
    rcases Finset.mem_Ico.mp hx' with ⟨hx10, hx100⟩
    refine Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ?_
    refine ⟨hx10, ?_⟩
    exact Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (lt_of_lt_of_le hx100 (by decide : 100 ≤ 100))
  set T : Finset (Finset ℕ) := S.powerset.erase ∅ with hT
  have hTcard : T.card = 1023 := by
    have : (S.powerset.erase (∅ : Finset ℕ)).card = S.powerset.card - 1 := by
      simpa using (Finset.card_erase_of_mem (by simpa using (Finset.mem_powerset.mpr (by intro x hx; cases hx))))
    have hpow : S.powerset.card = 2 ^ S.card := by simpa using S.card_powerset
    have : T.card = 2 ^ 10 - 1 := by
      simp [T, hpow, h₀]
    norm_num at this
    simpa [T] using this
  have hsum_le : ∀ A : Finset ℕ, A ⊆ S → (∑ x ∈ A, x) ≤ 990 := by
    intro A hAS
    have hcardA : A.card ≤ 10 := by
      simpa [h₀] using Finset.card_le_card hAS
    have hle : ∀ x ∈ A, x ≤ 99 := by
      intro x hxA
      have hxS : x ∈ S := hAS hxA
      have hxI : x ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ hxS
      rcases Finset.mem_Ico.mp hxI with ⟨_, hxlt⟩
      exact Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (lt_of_lt_of_le hxlt (by decide : 100 ≤ 100))
    have : (∑ x ∈ A, x) ≤ A.card * 99 := by
      simpa [Nat.mul_comm] using (Finset.sum_le_card_nsmul _ _ 99 hle)
    have : (∑ x ∈ A, x) ≤ 10 * 99 := le_trans this (by gcongr)
    simpa using this
  have hsum_mem : ∀ A ∈ T, (∑ x ∈ A, x) ∈ Finset.Icc 10 990 := by
    intro A hAT
    have hAne : A.Nonempty := by
      have : A ≠ ∅ := by
        have : A ∈ S.powerset.erase (∅ : Finset ℕ) := by simpa [T] using hAT
        exact Finset.mem_erase.mp this |>.1
      simpa [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty] using this
    have hAS : A ⊆ S := by
      have : A ∈ S.powerset := by
        have : A ∈ S.powerset.erase (∅ : Finset ℕ) := by simpa [T] using hAT
        exact (Finset.mem_erase.mp this).2
      exact Finset.mem_powerset.mp this
    have hsum_ge : 10 ≤ (∑ x ∈ A, x) := by
      rcases hAne with ⟨a, haA⟩
      have haS : a ∈ S := hAS haA
      have haI : a ∈ Finset.Ico 10 100 := h₁ haS
      have ha10 : 10 ≤ a := (Finset.mem_Ico.mp haI).1
      have : a ≤ ∑ x ∈ A, x := by
        simpa using (Finset.single_le_sum (fun _ _ => Nat.zero_le _) haA)
      exact le_trans ha10 this
    have hsum_le' : (∑ x ∈ A, x) ≤ 990 := hsum_le A hAS
    exact Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ⟨hsum_ge, hsum_le'⟩
  classical
  -- pigeonhole: 1023 nonempty subsets, sums in {10..990} (981 values)
  have : ∃ A B : Finset ℕ, A ∈ T ∧ B ∈ T ∧ A ≠ B ∧ (∑ x ∈ A, x) = ∑ x ∈ B, x := by
    let f : Finset ℕ → ℕ := fun A => ∑ x ∈ A, x
    have hf : ∀ A ∈ T, f A ∈ Finset.Icc 10 990 := by
      intro A hAT
      simpa [f] using hsum_mem A hAT
    have hcod : (Finset.Icc 10 990).card = 981 := by
      simp [Finset.card_Icc, Nat.succ_sub_succ_eq_sub, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
      norm_num
    have hdom : T.card = 1023 := hTcard
    have hlt : (Finset.Icc 10 990).card < T.card := by
      simp [hcod, hdom]
    classical
    rcases Finset.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt_of_maps_to hlt hf with ⟨A, hAT, B, hBT, hne, heq⟩
    refine ⟨A, B, hAT, hBT, ?_, ?_⟩
    · exact hne
    · simpa [f] using heq
  rcases this with ⟨A, B, hAT, hBT, hneAB, hsumAB⟩
  have hAS : A ⊆ S := by
    have : A ∈ S.powerset := by
      have : A ∈ S.powerset.erase (∅ : Finset ℕ) := by simpa [T] using hAT
      exact (Finset.mem_erase.mp this).2
    exact Finset.mem_powerset.mp this
  have hBS : B ⊆ S := by
    have : B ∈ S.powerset := by
      have : B ∈ S.powerset.erase (∅ : Finset ℕ) := by simpa [T] using hBT
      exact (Finset.mem_erase.mp this).2
    exact Finset.mem_powerset.mp this
  have hAne : A.Nonempty := by
    have : A ≠ ∅ := by
      have : A ∈ S.powerset.erase (∅ : Finset ℕ) := by simpa [T] using hAT
      exact (Finset.mem_erase.mp this).1
    simpa [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty] using this
  have hBne : B.Nonempty := by
    have : B ≠ ∅ := by
      have : B ∈ S.powerset.erase (∅ : Finset ℕ) := by simpa [T] using hBT
      exact (Finset.mem_erase.mp this).1
    simpa [Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty] using this
  -- make them disjoint by removing intersection
  let C : Finset ℕ := A ∩ B
  let S₁ : Finset ℕ := A \ C
  let S₂ : Finset ℕ := B \ C
  have hdis : Disjoint S₁ S₂ := by
    dsimp [S₁, S₂, C]
    exact Finset.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff
  have hsum' :
      (∑ x ∈ S₁, x) = ∑ x ∈ S₂, x := by
    have hA :
        (∑ x ∈ A, x) = (∑ x ∈ C, x) + ∑ x ∈ S₁, x := by
      have hCA : C ⊆ A := by intro x hx; exact (Finset.mem_inter.mp hx).1
      simpa [S₁, C, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using
        (Finset.sum_eq_sum_diff_add_sum_of_subset hCA (fun _ => by decide))
    have hB :
        (∑ x ∈ B, x) = (∑ x ∈ C, x) + ∑ x ∈ S₂, x := by
      have hCB : C ⊆ B := by intro x hx; exact (Finset.mem_inter.mp hx).2
      simpa [S₂, C, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using
        (Finset.sum_eq_sum_diff_add_sum_of_subset hCB (fun _ => by decide))
    have := congrArg (fun t => t) hsumAB
    -- cancel the common intersection sum
    have : (∑ x ∈ C, x) + ∑ x ∈ S₁, x = (∑ x ∈ C, x) + ∑ x ∈ S₂, x := by
      simpa [hA, hB, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hsumAB
    exact Nat.add_left_cancel this
  have hS₁sub : S₁ ⊆ S := by
    intro x hx
    have : x ∈ A := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1
    exact hAS this
  have hS₂sub : S₂ ⊆ S := by
    intro x hx
    have : x ∈ B := (Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx).1
    exact hBS this
  have hne : S₁.Nonempty ∧ S₂.Nonempty := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    rcases h with ⟨h1, h2⟩
    · have : A ⊆ B := by
        intro x hxA
        by_contra hxB
        have : x ∈ S₁ := by
          refine Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ?_
          refine ⟨hxA, ?_⟩
          intro hxC
          exact hxB (Finset.mem_inter.mp hxC).2
        exact (Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h1) (by exact ⟨x, this⟩)
      have : A = B := Finset.Subset.antisymm this (by
        intro x hxB
        by_contra hxA
        have : x ∈ S₂ := by
          refine Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ?_
          refine ⟨hxB, ?_⟩
          intro hxC
          exact hxA (Finset.mem_inter.mp hxC).1
        exact (Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h2) (by exact ⟨x, this⟩))
      exact hneAB this
  refine ⟨S₁, S₂, ?_, hS₁sub, ?_, hS₂sub, hdis, hsum'⟩
  · exact hne.1
  · exact hne.2
